name: @composer-test/adapter-srcalias
description: Adapter fixture whose catalog/index.ts imports its primitive schema via the adapter's OWN `@/registry/*` tsconfig alias, which resolves into a sibling `src/` tree copied alongside `catalog/` — the same shape @sifir/design-system ships (catalog/index.ts pulling from src/ via `@/registry/*`). Regression fixture for rewriteAdapterAliases rejecting a src/-resolving alias even after resolveAndCacheParent started copying src/.
